zmq.publish_address: Internal IPC path for CAN broadcast stream
zmq.send_address: Internal IPC path for sending CAN commands
zmq.hudiy_publish_address: Internal IPC path for HUD/DIY data stream
zmq.dis_draw: Internal IPC path for instrument cluster graphics
features.day_night_mode: Auto-switch map theme based on light status
features.time_sync.enabled: Sync vehicle clock with system time
features.carpihat.ign_pin: Physical BCM pin for ignition sensing
features.carpihat.ign_low_delay_seconds: Shutdown grace period after ignition loss
features.carpihat.debounce_time_seconds: Filtering time for hardware power triggers
features.carpihat.poll_interval_seconds: Frequency of hardware pin state checks
features.tv_simulation.enabled: Emulate factory TV tuner for Video-In
features.fis_display.enabled: Send custom text to the instrument cluster
features.fis_display.line1: Custom text for the top line of the FIS display
features.fis_display.line2: Custom text for the bottom line of the FIS display
features.dis_mode: Default focus for the instrument cluster screen
features.source_controls: Playback control via RNS-E source buttons
features.system_actions: Allow RNS-E to trigger Reboot or Shutdown
features.light_sensor_installed: Use external light sensor for dimming
features.car_time_zone: Regional offset for RNS-E clock sync
features.engineering_mode: Unlock technical menus and raw CAN ID edits
thresholds.long_press_message_count: Messages required for a Long Press
thresholds.extended_long_press_message_c: Messages required for Extended Long Press
thresholds.shutdown_delay_ignition_off_s: Delay before system power-off after ignition cut
thresholds.canbus_shutdown_delay_seconds: Keep-alive time for CAN bus communication
thresholds.cooldown_period_no_can_second: Grace period if CAN data is lost
thresholds.time_sync_threshold_minutes: Drift allowed before a clock sync occurs
mmi_scroll_commands: MMI button codes identified as rotational scrolling
key_mappings.mmi_short: Commands triggered by standard button clicks
key_mappings.mmi_extended: Special actions for very long holds
key_mappings.mfsw_commands: Raw codes for steering wheel communication
key_mappings.mfsw: Button remapping for steering wheel controls
key_mappings.mfsw.mode_short: Action for quick Mode button press
key_mappings.mfsw.mode_long: Action for holding the Mode button
source_data: Media source identification and keyboard emulation settings
source_data.tv_mode_identifier: Hex code to identify TV input source
source_data.play_key: Keyboard key mapped to Play command
source_data.pause_key: Keyboard key mapped to Pause command
platforms: Low-level protocol timings for supported chassis
platforms.A2: Protocol sequences for Audi A2 chassis
platforms.TT: Protocol sequences for Audi TT chassis
